name: Quick Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, stir together sugar and cocoa.
2. Blend in evaporated milk and corn syrup.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
4. Boil and stir for an additional minute.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in butter and vanilla.
7. Serve warm. Makes 1 3/4 cups of sauce.
